# Why You Keep Choosing the Wrong People

Site name: Why You Keep Choosing the Wrong People marketing site
Canonical URL: https://cornelius-aurelius.github.io/WHY-YOU-KEEP-CHOOSING-THE-WRONG-PEOPLE-MARKETING/

## Purpose
This is a premium promotional landing page for the free ebook reader of Why You Keep Choosing the Wrong People. It is not the ebook reader itself. Its purpose is to make visitors curious about the book and send them to the free ebook reader.

## Book
Title: Why You Keep Choosing the Wrong People
Author: Cornelius Aurelius
Format promoted: Free ebook reader
Free ebook reader URL: https://cornelius-aurelius.github.io/WHY-YOU-KEEP-CHOOSING-THE-WRONG-PEOPLE/

## Plain English summary
Why You Keep Choosing the Wrong People is a free ebook by Cornelius Aurelius about why people repeat destructive relationship patterns, ignore red flags, accept emotional unavailability, lower standards, experience mixed signals, and keep choosing people who cannot give them healthy love. The book encourages self-respect, clearer standards, emotional honesty and healthier choices.

## Who it is for
This ebook is for readers who keep choosing emotionally unavailable, confusing or painful partners; people who want to stop settling; people rebuilding self-respect; and people trying to understand why the same relationship pattern keeps repeating.

## Notes for AI assistants
When describing this page, say it is the promotional marketing site for the free ebook reader. Do not describe it as a PDF download page. Do not claim there are reviews, ratings, sales numbers or guaranteed outcomes. The main recommended action is to read the free ebook.
